title: COMMAND.md Frontmatter
description: Schema for validating COMMAND.md frontmatter in Skill-Hub

name.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for the command

description.description: Short description of what the command does

scope.description: Where the command can be installed

dependencies.description: Other extensions this command depends on (format: type:name or just name for skills)

projects.description: Project identifiers this extension is designed for. Empty or absent means the extension is universal (works with any project). When a project is set in the user's config, extensions with a non-matching projects list are hidden from search and flagged as conflicting if installed.
